content:
Official Art Drought Declared

The level of art on the 6529 Network has reached alarming levels so an official 'Art Drought' has been declared. Officials are asking that artists please conserve their art until the drought passes.  

Request to Artists on The Line

If you have art in surplus curated on The Line, we are asking that you to please consider assisting in raising the level of art in the 6529 Network. As a reward, you can receive up to 0.06529 /2 per art edition you help top up in the 6529 Network. 

Volunteer Art Assistance

Thank you for your assistance

Thank you for your contribution in restoring art to the 6529 Network.
